boundaries.title_guess: Bromyard / Kate & Jamie's farm; Farnham & Hartley Wintney christening

evidence.excerpt: August 31st 1995. ... Simon & Eve, Thomas 15, William 13, John 8, Charles 6, left for Bromyard, Kate & Jamie's farm.
On the way we passed through Hartley Wintney + stopped to see Peter + Belinda... On to Farnham... we walked to the church... reception
We got home about 7pm. ... Friday October 22nd. The seven of us set off for London at 10.20.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0171_L: trip 1 (Farnham/Hartley Wintney christening) ENDS at 'We got home about 7pm.'; the London trip STARTS at the next line 'Friday October 22nd. The seven of us set off for London at 10.20.'

evidence.excerpt: We are driving home up the motorway. ETA 7.50.
9th April 1996 ... 8.30. We set off for Beauchamps for John to go on his first 'cello course.

boundaries.title_guess: Calver Mill (Peak District), Tickhill puppy, Chatsworth

evidence.excerpt: John's concert was at 2.30... Home for supper.
Sat Apl 20. We set off at 9.30... arrived at Tickhill near Doncaster... On through Doncaster to Calver Mill.
After tea in the carpark at 4.30, we set off for home. May 25th Sat. We opened Peter's Birthday presents & set off at 10.20. On a day trip... to Farnborough Hall, 6 miles from Banbury.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0177_L: Calver/Chatsworth trip ENDS at 'we set off for home'; the Farnborough Hall day trip STARTS at 'May 25th Sat... set off at 10.20. On a day trip... to Farnborough Hall.'

boundaries.title_guess: Stratford & Tyburn Rd / Five Ways (day trip)

evidence.excerpt: May 28th Tuesday. 12 we set off to the south... We went to Stratford... drove on to Tyburn Rd... supper at J Jays at 5-ways.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0177_R: top of page continues/closes the Farnborough Hall sketch & visit; the Stratford day trip STARTS at 'May 28th Tuesday. 12 we set off to the south.'

evidence.excerpt: Saturday June 1st. 1pm we - P,J,C, S,E, set off for Laurel Spooner's 40th... at Layer Marney Tower near Colchester... camping on the island of Mersea, Ten Farm campsite.
Sunday June 16th. We picked Peter up... on our way to see the puppy... Tea at Appleby Magna... on the way home.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0179_L: opens with the June 16th Doncaster/puppy day trip; a second trip (Thorpeness) STARTS lower on the same page at 'Sunday 13th July. We seven + Naomi Grimley collected Peter from Evensong + set off to Thorpeness.'

evidence.excerpt: Sunday 13th July. We seven + Naomi Grimley collected Peter from Evensong + set off to Thorpeness.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Second boundary on A_0179_L (see above): the Thorpeness trip starts mid-page; it then closes on A_0179_R ('At 4.45... we left for home on Thursday July 17th').

boundaries.title_guess: Ireland (Glendalough, Kilkenny, Cashel, Dingle, Blaskets, Burren, Knowth)

evidence.excerpt: we left for home on Thursday July 17th. Saturday August 3rd. At 10.10. we set off, all 7 of us, for Ireland.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0179_R: Thorpeness trip ENDS at 'we left for home on Thursday July 17th'; the Ireland trip STARTS at 'Saturday August 3rd. At 10.10. we set off, all 7 of us, for Ireland.'

boundaries.title_guess: Beauchamp music camp drop-off (Peter with Portals)

evidence.excerpt: We are travelling home on John's birthday... We got home at 11, the van on a truck.
Sunday 25th August. We left to take Peter to join the Portals at Beauchamp music camp.

boundaries.title_guess: Stamford Bridge campsite & farm; Malvern (William's birthday)

evidence.excerpt: Friday Sept 13th. We set off at 6.15. & spent 25 minutes at WoodEnd... On to Stamford Bridge a campsite.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0190_R: the short Aug 25 Beauchamp drop-off ENDS, and the Sept 13 Stamford Bridge trip STARTS at 'Friday Sept 13th. We set off at 6.15.'

boundaries.title_guess: London (Chad/Coda Centre, Fulham) & Belgium (Ypres, Kortrijk, Oudenaarde, Gent)

evidence.excerpt: Wed Oct 23rd. Simon, William, Peter, John & Charles left at 10.35. for Chad to pack... arrived at the Coda Centre, Munster Rd., Fulham, London.
we went to the Channel Tunnel... on to Belgium. Kemmel campsite near Ypra.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0191_R: top of page closes the Stamford Bridge / farm / Malvern outing ('Tea & on to Malvern... Lovely, long (tiring) day.'); the London-then-Belgium trip STARTS at 'Wed Oct 23rd. Simon, William, Peter, John & Charles left at 10.35.'

boundaries.title_guess: Forest of Dean (Pedalaway) & Beauchamp cello course

evidence.excerpt: We'd have liked to visit Leeds Castle... drove on home. Saturday 1997 April 5th. We left at 8.30 + breakfasted at the M50 turn-off... We reached a campsite next to the Forest of Dean.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0195_L: the Oct 1996 Belgium/Ypres trip ENDS (return via Broadhembury overnight stop, 'drove on home'); the April 1997 Forest of Dean trip STARTS at 'Saturday 1997 April 5th. We left at 8.30.'

evidence.excerpt: We set off for home at 4.50.
Friday 18 April. We left at about 6.15 pm for Robert Grimley's installation at Bristol... We camped at Failand.

notes: Window is Vol A Book 3 (1995-1997). Opens with index page A_0169 (Book 2 tail, entries 76-80) plus blank pages A_0169_R/A_0170_L, which belong to the surrounding index/trip-1 start. Many short weekend/day outings are clustered onto mixed pages (A_0177, A_0179, A_0190, A_0191); a few are low-confidence because the family stacks consecutive short trips without a clear home-return line. The Bristol installation trip (A_0197_L) runs to the end of the window and closes within it at A_0198_L ('After lunch we set off home'), so nothing is left open at the window edge.
